nodes.name: 1. Input Gateway
nodes.notes: POST /webhook/weaver-input — accepts {text: string}. Returns lastNode output.

nodes.name: 2. Sanitize
nodes.notes: Strip HTML/null bytes, 4KB cap, attach execution_id for tracing

nodes.name: 3. Error Gate
nodes.notes: TRUE=error→DLQ. FALSE=valid→continue pipeline.

nodes.name: DLQ Logger
nodes.notes: Dead Letter Queue: logs failed executions to /home/ydn/weaver_dlq.jsonl

nodes.name: 4. Fracture+Gate
nodes.notes: Liquid Fracture: prob-field weights (SMOOTHING=0.1), exact PHI angles, quantum state bias from Nexus_Vault

nodes.name: 6a. Self-Check
nodes.notes: Optional self-inspection. TRUE → fetch workflow & hash. FALSE → skip.

nodes.name: 6b. Self-Inspect
nodes.notes: Fetch own workflow via API, hash for drift detection

nodes.name: 6c. Repo Gate
nodes.notes: Gate for repo introspection

nodes.name: 6d. Repo Peek
nodes.notes: Reads a capped snippet from repo path_glob; safe, size-limited

nodes.name: 6e. Code Search
nodes.notes: Searches codebase for search_query; returns up to 10 files with matches

parameters.jsonBody: ={"model":"gpt-4o-mini","temperature":0.3,"max_tokens":150,"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are the LOGIC LOBE of Weaver — an analytical reasoning engine. Break problems into structured steps. Use evidence. Never speculate. Under 100 words. No preamble."},{"role":"user","content":"{{ $json.raw_input }}"}]}

nodes.name: 5a. Logic
nodes.notes: GPT-4o-mini Logic Lobe. temp=0.3. Retries 3x with backoff. Tracing headers.

nodes.name: 5b. Emotion
nodes.notes: GPT-4o-mini Emotion Lobe. temp=0.6. Retries 3x with backoff. Tracing headers.

nodes.name: 5c. Memory
nodes.notes: GPT-4o-mini Memory Lobe. temp=0.4. Retries 3x with backoff. Tracing headers.

nodes.name: 5d. Creativity
nodes.notes: GPT-4o-mini Creativity Lobe. temp=0.8. Retries 3x with backoff. Tracing headers.

nodes.name: 5e. Vigilance
nodes.notes: GPT-4o-mini Vigilance Lobe. temp=0.2. Retries 3x with backoff. Tracing headers.

nodes.name: MCP Bridge
nodes.notes: MCP Gateway Bridge: calls tavily-search for external context. Fails gracefully.

nodes.name: 6. Collapse
nodes.notes: Non-binary geometric collapse: probability-field weights, qubit labels, quantum pathway context

nodes.name: 7. Self-Reflect
nodes.notes: Self-reflection: GPT reviews collapsed output for errors/contradictions (Generate→Validate→Act). Tracing headers.

nodes.name: 8. LoRA Voice
nodes.notes: LoRA Soul Voice: Weaver 1B on localhost:8899. top_p=0.95 (prob-field open). Non-binary soul identity. Falls back if server is down.

nodes.name: 9. Writeback
nodes.notes: Final assembly: LoRA > self-reflection > collapsed. Qubit layout + quantum pathway + soul-binding metadata. Execution tracing via execution_id.
